quoted_text: It started yesterday afternoon, and Iran is wasting no time getting its tankers back into circulation. the @WindwardAI platform this morning sees yet another NITC very large crude carrier on the move. Dan left its hidey-hole off Riau archipelago where it's been dark since May 23 and is now heading to Iran for loading.
